untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition across 3 consecutive candles with specific body size relationships (first two tall, third small), trendline resistance identification, and multi-bar sequence validation. Current rule engine only supports single-bar and two-bar lookback conditions. Cannot express: (1) three-candle body comparison logic, (2) trendline resistance detection, (3) consolidation pattern identification, (4) relative body sizing constraints across bars.
translation_notes: This is a complex candlestick pattern requiring multi-bar sequence analysis and trendline detection that exceeds the capabilities of the rule engine's indicator set and operator vocabulary. The pattern involves comparing body sizes across 3 bars and detecting breakouts through resistance levels, neither of which can be properly expressed using available single-bar and two-bar indicators.
